The '''Massassi knuckler''' was a four-bladed weapon used for close combat. To provide for better grip, the center of the knife was wrapped in leather with two curved blades emerging from either side.<ref name="SWG" />

[[HK-47]] possessed a variant of this knuckler during his [[Time/Legends|time]] on [[Mustafar/Legends|Mustafar]].<ref name="Trials">''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Trials of Obi-Wan]]''</ref>

{{Weapon-stub}}
